issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Production FastAPI deploy on a 4-core VPS
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses Gunicorn+UvicornWorker but only 4 workers (missed the (2*cores)+1 formula) and omits documented flags like --timeout 120, --graceful-timeout 30, and access/error logfiles; treatment uses 9 workers, all documented flags, warns against --reload in production, and configures proxy_headers behind a reverse proxy.

scenarios.name: Real client IP behind a load balancer
scenarios.rationale: Baseline mentions --proxy-headers and custom middleware as one of several options; treatment anchors to the documented programmatic uvicorn.run config with proxy_headers=True and forwarded_allow_ips and notes the same pattern under Gunicorn+UvicornWorker.
